prompt: A full-body anime character poster on a vertical canvas, designed like a dramatic manga-themed hero introduction. At the top left, large bold Japanese title text reads "マンガ柱" with small furigana "ばしら" above it, and beneath it a black nameplate with pink trim reads "漫画咲" with small furigana above the kanji. In the center stands an energetic teenage girl anime swordswoman, facing forward in a confident wide stance, smiling brightly with an open mouth and sparkling eyes. She has very long voluminous twin-tail hair in pastel pink, with multicolored streaks of cyan, yellow, and lavender woven through the hair, and many decorative hair clips and ribbons, including small manga-themed tags. Her eye color is large and vivid pink-purple with glossy highlights. She wears a dark navy or black demon-slayer-inspired uniform with gold buttons, a white belt, loose tucked pants, white leg wraps printed with manga sound effects and doodles, and black platform sandals with pink straps. Over the uniform she wears a flowing haori whose entire outer surface is covered in black-and-white manga panels and graphic inked artwork, while the lining is bright pink. She holds 2 katanas: one raised across her shoulders in her right hand and one lowered in her left hand. Both swords have manga-decorated sheaths and hilts with pink accents, and one sheath includes bold Japanese lettering. Add small star-shaped sparkles around her. Surround her with flying loose manga pages and clipped comic panels, scattered diagonally across the composition as if blown by wind. Include 3 large manga sound-effect texts in pink and black: one "ドン!" at lower left, one "ドン!" near the lower right leg, and one "ドン" on the right side of the haori. Also include 2 speech-bubble callouts: one spiky bubble at upper right containing "!!" and one vertical spiky bubble at left containing Japanese dialogue. The background is a soft pink-and-white halftone and ink-splash pattern with dynamic speed lines radiating inward, giving the feel of a manga cover splash page. High-detail polished anime illustration, crisp linework, expressive face, glossy hair, fashionable fantasy styling, playful heroic attitude, vibrant pink-centric palette, poster-quality composition.
